requirement_topic.en: CONATEL Mandatory Homologación (Type Approval) for Radio and Telecom Terminal Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: CONATEL强制型式认可（型号认证）——无线电及电信终端设备
requirement_topic.zht: CONATEL強制型式認可（型號認證）——無線電及電信終端設備

summary.en: All radio and telecommunications terminal equipment (including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, and cellular IoT devices) imported into or sold in Venezuela must obtain a CONATEL homologación (type approval) certificate issued by CONATEL (Comisión Nacional de Telecomunicaciones) before importation or commercialisation. The legal basis is the Ley Orgánica de Telecomunicaciones (LOTEL) 2000 and subsequent CONATEL resolutions. Applicants must submit a technical file including product specifications and test reports from a recognised laboratory; FCC or CE test reports may be submitted as a technical basis but do not substitute for the CONATEL certificate. The approved device must display the CONATEL approval number. CCC, SRRC, and MIIT NAL approvals are not recognised by CONATEL.
summary.zh: 所有进口或在委内瑞拉销售的无线电及电信终端设备（包括Wi-Fi、蓝牙及蜂窝物联网设备），在进口或商业销售前，须取得由CONATEL（国家电信委员会）颁发的CONATEL型式认可证书。法律依据为2000年《电信组织法》（LOTEL）及后续CONATEL决议。申请人须提交技术档案，包括产品规格及经认可实验室出具的测试报告；FCC或CE测试报告可作为技术依据提交，但不能替代CONATEL证书。获批设备须标注CONATEL认可编号。CCC、SRRC及MIIT进网许可不被CONATEL承认。
summary.zht: 所有進口或在委內瑞拉銷售的無線電及電信終端設備（包括Wi-Fi、藍牙及蜂窩物聯網裝置），在進口或商業銷售前，須取得由CONATEL（國家電信委員會）頒發的CONATEL型式認可證書。法律依據為2000年《電信組織法》（LOTEL）及後續CONATEL決議。申請人須提交技術檔案，包括產品規格及經認可實驗室出具的測試報告；FCC或CE測試報告可作為技術依據提交，但不能替代CONATEL證書。獲批設備須標注CONATEL認可編號。CCC、SRRC及MIIT進網許可不被CONATEL承認。

standards_or_laws: Ley Orgánica de Telecomunicaciones (LOTEL) 2000 — mandatory homologación framework
CONATEL Resoluciones on type approval procedures for radio and telecom terminal equipment
CONATEL homologación technical requirements (test reports, technical file submission)

summary.en: China MIIT/SRRC type approval: wireless transmitters require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) radio type approval, and telecom terminal equipment requires a MIIT Network Access License (NAL/进网许可). These are issued by Chinese regulatory bodies and cover Chinese market access only. Neither SRRC approval nor MIIT NAL confers any recognition in Venezuela; a separate CONATEL homologación must be obtained. Chinese test reports prepared to GB or ITU standards may support the CONATEL application but are not automatically accepted.
summary.zh: 中国MIIT/SRRC型式核准：无线发射设备须取得SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）无线电型式核准，电信终端设备须取得MIIT进网许可。这些证书由中国监管机构颁发，仅涵盖中国市场准入。SRRC核准和MIIT进网许可均不在委内瑞拉获得承认；须另行取得CONATEL型式认可。按照GB或ITU标准编制的中国测试报告可支持CONATEL申请，但不被自动接受。
summary.zht: 中國MIIT/SRRC型式核准：無線發射設備須取得SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）無線電型式核准，電信終端設備須取得MIIT進網許可。這些證書由中國監管機構頒發，僅涵蓋中國市場准入。SRRC核准和MIIT進網許可均不在委內瑞拉獲得承認；須另行取得CONATEL型式認可。按照GB或ITU標準編制的中國測試報告可支持CONATEL申請，但不被自動接受。

standards_or_laws: SRRC radio type approval (State Radio Regulation of China) — wireless transmitters
MIIT Network Access License (NAL / 进网许可) — telecom terminal equipment
GB radio and telecom terminal equipment standards (MIIT)

gap.en: FULL GAP — CONATEL homologación is mandatory and no foreign approval (CCC, SRRC, MIIT NAL, FCC, CE) is recognised as a substitute. A separate CONATEL application and Venezuelan certificate is required before any radio or telecom terminal equipment may be imported or sold in Venezuela. FCC or CE test reports may be submitted as supporting technical evidence but do not eliminate the need for the CONATEL certificate.
gap.zh: 完全差距——CONATEL型式认可为强制要求，任何境外核准（CCC、SRRC、MIIT进网许可、FCC、CE）均不被承认为替代。在委内瑞拉进口或销售任何无线电或电信终端设备前，须另行提交CONATEL申请并取得委内瑞拉证书。FCC或CE测试报告可作为技术佐证材料提交，但不能免除取得CONATEL证书的义务。
gap.zht: 完全差距——CONATEL型式認可為強制要求，任何境外核准（CCC、SRRC、MIIT進網許可、FCC、CE）均不被承認為替代。在委內瑞拉進口或銷售任何無線電或電信終端設備前，須另行提交CONATEL申請並取得委內瑞拉證書。FCC或CE測試報告可作為技術佐證材料提交，但不能免除取得CONATEL證書的義務。

source.publisher: CONATEL — Comisión Nacional de Telecomunicaciones, Venezuela

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] CONATEL homologación is the primary mandatory compliance gate for any Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, or cellular IoT device entering the Venezuelan market. No foreign type approval substitutes for it. Exporters must engage a local Venezuelan representative or agent to submit the CONATEL application, provide a compliant technical file, and obtain the certificate before shipment. Verify current CONATEL homologación procedures and fees directly with CONATEL or a qualified Venezuelan regulatory specialist, as processing times and requirements are subject to change.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] CONATEL型式认可是任何Wi-Fi、蓝牙或蜂窝物联网设备进入委内瑞拉市场的主要强制性合规关口。任何境外型式核准均不能替代。出口商须委托当地委内瑞拉代表或代理人提交CONATEL申请、提供符合要求的技术档案，并在发货前取得证书。请直接向CONATEL或合格的委内瑞拉监管专业人士核验当前CONATEL型式认可程序及费用，因为处理时间和要求可能随时变化。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] CONATEL型式認可是任何Wi-Fi、藍牙或蜂窩物聯網裝置進入委內瑞拉市場的主要強制性合規關口。任何境外型式核准均不能替代。出口商須委託當地委內瑞拉代表或代理人提交CONATEL申請、提供符合要求的技術檔案，並在發貨前取得證書。請直接向CONATEL或合格的委內瑞拉監管專業人士核驗當前CONATEL型式認可程序及費用，因為處理時間和要求可能隨時變化。
